channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 skydoves/compose-nav-graph (479 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: skydoves

📝 Repository: skydoves/compose-nav-graph

📄 Descrizione: ⛵️ Compose Navigation Graph plugin for Android Studio that visualizes your entire app flow as an interactive map of rendered previews, typed arguments, and transitions.

⭐ Stelle: 479

🍴 Forks: 21

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android compose compose-multiplatform jetpack-compose jetpack-navigation kmp kotlin-multiplatform navigation navigation3 skydoves

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-12T05:58:40Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-10T11:30:59Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ciddwd/overlay-translator (256 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ciddwd

📝 Repository: ciddwd/overlay-translator

📄 Descrizione: 无 ROOT 的开源 Android 屏幕实时翻译：面向游戏、视觉小说与漫画，支持端侧/云端 OCR、离线 LLM、多翻译引擎与悬浮窗叠加。Open-source, no-root Android screen translator with OCR, offline LLMs and floating overlays.

⭐ Stelle: 256

🍴 Forks: 9

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android android-app deepl game-translation gguf jetpack-compose kotlin llama-cpp llm manga manga-ocr mediaprojection mlkit ocr offline-translation paddleocr screen-translation shizuku translation visual-novel

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-22T10:58:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-21T04:48:52Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 risa-labs-inc/BossConsole (156 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: risa-labs-inc

📝 Repository: risa-labs-inc/BossConsole

📄 Descrizione: Open-source, multi-platform harness for AI agents — a native, multi-threaded operator's console (JVM, not Electron) to run Claude Code, Codex, Gemini or OpenCode with a real browser, terminal, editor, secrets & 100+ MCP tools. Built for enterprises, science & research.

⭐ Stelle: 156

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: agent-harness ai-agents browser claude-code codex compose-multiplatform desktop-app gemini hot-reload jvm kotlin-multiplatform llm mcp model-context-protocol multithreading open-source opencode rbac terminal

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-21T01:01:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-23T04:05:41Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 keweis2/eOr (66 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: keweis2

📝 Repository: keweis2/eOr

📄 Descrizione: eOr — short for emulation, organized — is a fast, gorgeous game launcher for Android handhelds and phones. Point it at your games, let it pull box art, screenshots and video previews automatically, and launch straight into your games — all wrapped in a polished, controller-first interface.

item.description:

📝 Repository: agupta07505/SmartIsland

📄 Descrizione: Smart Island is a modern, open-source implementation of Android's Dynamic Island experience. It transforms notifications, media playback, incoming calls, timers, charging status, and other live activities into a beautiful floating island with smooth animations and a premium user experience.

item.title: 📝 ITSDevelopmentCore/hypervault-crypto (48 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ITSDevelopmentCore

📝 Repository: ITSDevelopmentCore/hypervault-crypto

📄 Descrizione: Offline cryptographic core of Hypervault: Argon2id, HKDF, AES-256-GCM, HV1 vault format, BIP-32/39, SLIP-10, air-gapped signing. Pure Kotlin, single dependency (Bouncy Castle).

⭐ Stelle: 48

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: aes-gcm air-gapped argon2id bip32 bip39 cryptography kotlin offline-first password-manager security
